matrix.p99_latency_impact: Medium (Improves processing, but doesn't fix DB bottlenecks)
matrix.best_for: Stateless microservices, web servers, API Gateways.

matrix.resilience: Medium (Still a single point of failure within that node)
matrix.best_for: Legacy monolithic databases, stateful legacy applications.

matrix.p99_latency_impact: Very Low (Optimizes read paths and isolates failures)
matrix.cloud_cost: Medium (Requires extra infrastructure like Kafka/Redis but optimizes compute)
matrix.complexity: High (Requires asynchronous thinking and eventual consistency)
matrix.resilience: Very High (Architecturally defends against cascading failure)
matrix.best_for: Massive scale enterprise systems facing hard data bottlenecks.
